sources_checked.limitation: Location/identity confirmation page only (address, hours, links); no menu items. Confirms East Village location at 132 2nd Ave, New York, NY 10002 (note: site lists zip 10002, task provided 10003 — same street address/city, treated as the same location).

Fetched via mcp__workspace__web_fetch first, which returned an empty JS shell (nav/social links only, no menu text) because the menu is a JS-rendered tabbed interface. Escalated once to Claude-in-Chrome (rendered browser) which successfully extracted the full 'Weekday' tab (Breakfast, Sides, Shareables, Salads & Bowls, Pizzas, Plates, Desserts — 48 dishes). Attempted to click into the 'Drinks' tab for beverage consolidation, but the extracted page text did not update within the time box, so Drinks/cocktails/wine/beer/coffee items were not captured. Other tabs (Weekend Brunch, Happy Hour, Vegetarian, Vegan, Gluten-Free) also not captured — likely overlapping subsets of the Weekday items rather than distinct dishes.

manual_review_reason: Beverage/drinks menu tab could not be extracted within the sourcing time box (JS tab click did not refresh captured text); if beverage allergen data (e.g., beer gluten flag) is required for this restaurant, a follow-up visit to https://www.cafemaud.com/menu (Drinks tab) or an ordering platform is needed. Also note the official site lists the East Village location zip as 10002 rather than the 10003 given in the task; street address and city match exactly and this is treated as the correct location.
